details.address: 12820 S Tryon St Suite 100, Charlotte, NC 28273

raw_data.address: 12820 S Tryon St suite 100, Charlotte, NC 28273
raw_data.name: Palm Berries

popular_times.title: Usually as busy as it gets
Usually as busy as it gets
Usually as busy as it gets
Usually as busy as it gets

reviews_data.review_text: Great atmosphere,  menu selection is premium and Emma walked me through the menu with professional ease.
Good place
Super good, generous portion size and great customer service!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Chad,
Thank you for the great review of our açaí bowls despite our sizing mistake. We are so sorry for the error. Please send us an email at palmberriessteelecreek@gmail.com so we can work with you to make it right!
reviews_data.review_text: So, I'm only giving it 5 stars because the Acai bowl was so delicious. Be careful if you order online...I ordered a "regular" size and didn't think to check before I left. I got all the way home, and realized I paid for a "regular" but got the "snack" size.

Love the vibes of Palm Berries Steele Creek! It’s a beautiful establishment — with the pretty murals on the walls, the comfy chairs and couch by the fire, and just the overall lighting and colors. Loved the touch of the photo wall with the owners of the different locations. Makes it feel kind of like a home.

But more importantly than how clean and beautiful it is, the food is delicious! My boys LOVED their banana berry smoothies and my daughter and I loved building our own custom açaí bowls. The very berry base - delicious! The toppings - fresh and yummy!

And the staff - super knowledgeable and friendly! Highly recommend this location!!
Always fresh amd very clean. The staff has always been amazing to me every visit

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: I love this place sooo much they are so nice the bowls are always sooo good and the service is soo good

Wow this place is wonderful and so is the staff thank you to the young lady who helped me create my bowl wonderful experience and even  atmosphere I’ll be dinning in next time and plus the bowl is out of this world good!!!

This place is great!! I have severe Celiac Disease and the staff here were AMAZING at accommodations and making sure my bowl was safe!! They really do care about allergies and their customers. The açaí bowl was fantastic, but most importantly, I never feel safe eating out and never eat out because of it so this is a really special treat for me. Thank you for making my day!!
I came here for the first time and Mya was so helpful ! Great customer service, very clean, and a great place ! Will definitely be back and big shout out to MYA!!

review_questions.Group size: 1 person, 2 people, 3-4 people, 5-8 people, Suitable for all group sizes
review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Finally! An awesome Açaí Bowl in SW Charlotte. Thank you Palm Berries. I will be back.
Best tasting Açaí bowl in the entire world!!! Trust me I have tried them all and this is hands down the best!!!! Please open a location in Gastonia !!!! It will be a hit trust me ☺️!!!!
Super cute new addition to the neighborhood! Perfect in time for spring and this summer! Plus, it quite yummy!
Excellent and tasty bowls, friendly waitstaff, wait is not too long.
Best Acai bowls in the steele creek area hands down! Definitely worth the price unlike what jimmy says and I wouldn’t expect a berry place to sell coffee
The owners take so much pride in this shop and the product is consistently outstanding!

So delicious- excellent customer service
Dubai style is Amazing

This is my spot yow. This is where I come for quiet time and a treat, where I occasionally do Bible study and journaling and also the spot I treat my kids and family to for one-on-one dates with me. Abba knew I needed this place. God bless Palm Berries

I was excited to learn that we had this type of establishment in our neighborhood, as this was a pleasant surprise to add to the Steele Creek area. I thoroughly enjoyed my custom made acai bowl, the atmosphere was beautiful & the service was excellent.   Please stop by to try a bowl or smoothie.

So glad this place opened up! The bowls are stuffed to the brim and don’t let the word ‘snack’ fool you the snack size is plenty big! The owner, Amy, is very sweet and really wants to make sure you are happy. Only thing that would make it better is opening up one in Lake Wylie!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Delicious - Healthy and Locally Owned!  Palm Berries is my favorite place to grab lunch or dinner.   I love supporting locally owned businesses.   The  new Steele Creek location is the location I visit.   The staff is always very helpful and friendly.   I am so happy to have a local place that offers so many healthy options.    I recommend the build your own bowl!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Awesome customer service, awesome acai bowls. I think they are fairly priced especially with the amount you get. I ordered the regular sized Queen City Bowl with granola to-go. I went shopping next door at Publix and then drove home which was about 10-15 minutes total while the acai sat in my backseat inside a paper bag. Still intact, and delicious. There is an ample amount of seating available inside and a couple of two seat tables outside as well. Very clean and vibrant. Smells good. I hope this place stays, I really do because I believe at least 2 businesses tried in this same spot but did not last within the last 3-5 years alone. Come try out Palm Berries, they also have smoothies and options for protein as well if you some want gainz!
Me and my Daughters new spot for sure!!!

Great addition to the neighborhood.
Very delicious and fresh meal with an extraordinary service and atmosphere!
I’m happy that I found this place, fresh and so good 👍❤️🤤
Fire
So easy and the inside is so Beautiful
Excellent smoothies, great service, very kid-friendly. A welcome addition to our community.
Trying the Queen Dream with a pinch of spinach & kale... Delicious 😋. Move over Smoothie King, this is my new place!

My protein bowl was delicious. But not $20 worth of delicious. It’s unfortunate this place costs so much, and that they don’t have a water fountain, or sell coffee. All they sell to drink are other expensive bottled beverages.
Palm berries is for sure a VIBE!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Emma!  Delicious food and good vibes are the keys to life! :)
reviews_data.review_text: Great food and good vibes. Service was prompt, store was clean, and the food was delicious. Highly recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We're stoked you loved your Dubai bowl!  Thanks so much for the kind words, and we look forward to hosting you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: The place is so good! Tried Dubai chocolate bowls. It’s the best açaí bowl I’ve tried in years! Very dense and flavorful, middle size was tooo big for me, next time going for small bowl. Very good quality of the everything in it, tastes amazing , so happy this place exists now . The atmosphere is great and place is beautiful as well!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We're so glad to be in the Steele Creek community!  Thanks for stopping by, and we look forward to seeing you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: So glad to finally have an açaí shop nearby. Not only do they have bowls, but they also have protein smoothies! My daughter love açaí bowls during spring and summer. It’s a nice refreshing treat. The fruit was fresh and smoothie and bowl was great. The space also have a very nice atmosphere. We will be here often!
W service w staff w vibe w acaí bowl

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for your kind words, Karis!  And what a great photo of our space!  We're glad you found it so inviting, and we look forward to welcoming you back soon.
reviews_data.review_text: First time trying out Palm berries in Steele Creek - this place is so great! So vibrant, clean, and inviting. Delicious, fresh bowls, and very friendly staff. I couldn’t even wait to take a photo of the yummy bowl, had to dive right in. We’ll definitely be back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Leroy!  We appreciate your support and look forward to seeing you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: We went here on Opening day and everything was very good. So refreshing
Delicious and great customer service!
Best acai bowl!!

Best Açaí Bowls in the game!
The owners are super cool people and the service is top tier!
Our go to meal for Daddy Daughter dates at the park!
Best açaí bowls in town. So fresh and delicious

Palm Berries is absolutely amazing! The smoothies and açaí bowls are hands-down some of the best I’ve ever had — everything tasted incredibly fresh and delicious. The customer service was fantastic, and the staff was so friendly and welcoming. The store itself was spotless, beautifully decorated, and had such a cozy, inviting atmosphere. I genuinely cannot wait to come back. Highly recommend!
Delicious acai bowls! The protein bowl is amazing, so high in protein and so good!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much, Manasa, for visiting us on our first day!  Excellent choices on the Dubai bowl and the Sunset bowl!  We look forward to seeing you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Been here for the grand opening. Ordered viral Dubai chocolate bowl and a sunset bowl in regular size. Both were delicious and the portion size is huge. Ambience is quite cute and the service was very fast. Will definitely be back here.
